text:
Tens of thousands of fans gathered on Paris' most famous avenue for a parade of athletes who took part in the Olympics and Paralympics.

Mainly packed stadia, iconic venues and the feel-good factor derived from the Olympics that came before it turned the Paralympics into a festival of sport.

The original purpose of the Games was to rehabilitate disabled World War II veterans.

The 45-year-old – a six-time gold medallist – announced his decision after finishing fifth in the men’s wheelchair marathon.

The 35-year-old, who has cerebral palsy, is the first Singaporean to win a medal in the sport at the Games.

About 3,000 supporters, including family members of the athletes, cheered them on.

'It was so nice that S'poreans came out to all the various cheer points to just say hi to us,' says swimmer Yip Pin Xiu.
